name: datto-saas-protection-mcp
description: MCP server for Datto SaaS Protection (Backupify) - access M365/GWS backup status, queue restores, and review seat usage through AI assistants
long_description: Provides AI assistants with structured access to your Datto SaaS Protection (Backupify) tenant. List customer organizations and protected domains, browse seats and backup history for Microsoft 365 and Google Workspace, queue restores, monitor restore progress, and review activity logs and license usage through the Model Context Protocol.

datto_saas_api_key.title: Datto SaaS API Key
datto_saas_api_key.description: Your Datto SaaS Protection (Backupify) API key
